en.extract:
The rufous-capped babbler (Cyanoderma ruficeps) is a babbler species in the family Timaliidae. It occurs from the Eastern Himalayas to northern Thailand, Laos, eastern China to Vietnam and Taiwan. It inhabits temperate forest with dense bushes or bamboo and is listed as Least Concern on the IUCN Red List.
It is pale olive with a bright rufous crown and nape, measures 12 cm (4.7 in) long and weighs 7–12 g (0.25–0.42 oz).
Stachyris ruficeps was the scientific name proposed by Edward Blyth in 1847 for an olive-coloured babbler with a ferruginous crown and a white throat collected in Darjeeling.
It was later placed in the genus Stachyridopsis.


References


External links
BirdLife International (2019). "Rufous-capped Babbler Cyanoderma ruficeps".

The '''rufous-capped babbler''' ('''''Cyanoderma ruficeps''''') is a babbler species in the family [[Timaliidae]]. It occurs from the [[Eastern Himalayas]] to northern [[Thailand]], [[Laos]], eastern [[China]] to [[Vietnam]] and [[Taiwan]]. It inhabits [[temperate forest]] with dense bushes or bamboo and is listed as [[Least Concern]] on the [[IUCN Red List]].<ref name=iucn />

It is pale olive with a bright rufous crown and nape, measures {{convert|12|cm|abbr=on}} long and weighs {{convert|7-12|g|abbr=on}}.<ref name=HBoW2016>{{cite book |year=2016 |editor1=del Hoyo, J. |editor2=Elliott, A. |editor3=Sargatal, J. |editor4=Christie, D. A. |editor5=de Juana, E. |title=Handbook of the Birds of the World |publisher=Lynx Edicions |location=Barcelona |volume=2: Passerines |last1=Collar |first1=N. J. |last2=Robson |first2=C. |chapter=Rufous-capped Babbler (''Cyanoderma ruficeps'') |chapter-url=https://www.hbw.com/species/rufous-capped-babbler-cyanoderma-ruficeps }}</ref>

''Stachyris ruficeps'' was the [[scientific name]] proposed by [[Edward Blyth]] in 1847 for an olive-coloured babbler with a ferruginous crown and a white throat collected in [[Darjeeling]].<ref name=Blyth1847>{{cite journal |last1=Blyth |first1=E. |year=1847 |title=Notes and Descriptions of various New or Little-known Species of Birds |journal=The Journal of the Asiatic Society of Bengal |volume=16 |issue=1 |pages=428–476 |url=https://archive.org/details/journalofasiatic161asia/page/452}}</ref>
It was later placed in the genus ''Stachyridopsis''.<ref>{{cite journal |last1=Moyle |first1=R. G. |last2=Andersen |first2=M. J. |last3=Oliveros |first3=C. H. |last4=Steinheimer |first4=F. D. |last5=Reddy |first5=S. |year=2012 |title=Phylogeny and Biogeography of the Core Babblers (Aves: Timaliidae) |journal=Systematic Biology |volume=61 |issue=4 |pages=631–651 |doi=10.1093/sysbio/sys027 |pmid=22328569|doi-access=free }}</ref><ref name=HBoW2016/>

zh.extract:
红头穗鹛（学名：Cyanoderma ruficeps），又名山红头，是画眉科的一种。其分佈範圍從東喜馬拉雅山脈至北泰國、寮國、東中國至越南和台灣。它棲息於密生灌木或竹林的溫帶森林中，在IUCN紅色名錄上被列為無危物種。


分類
Stachyris ruficeps 是愛德華·布萊思於1847年提出的學名，用於描述一種具有鐵銹色頭頂和白色喉部的橄欖色畫眉，該標本採集於大吉嶺。 後來它被劃分至偽穗鶥屬（Stachyridopsis）。


亚种
红头穗鹛滇西亚种（学名：Cyanoderma ruficeps bhamoense）。分布于缅甸東北部以及中国大陆的云南等地。该物种的模式产地在缅甸八莫。
红头穗鹛普通亚种（学名：Cyanoderma ruficeps davidi）。分布于越南北部、老挝西北部以及中国大陆的陕西、四川、云南、贵州、湖北、湖南湖南、安徽、江西、广东、浙江、福建等地。该物种的模式产地在四川。
红头穗鹛海南亚种（学名：Cyanoderma ruficeps goodsoni），是中国的特有亞种。僅分布于海南。该物种的模式产地在海南岛。
山紅頭台灣亞種（学名：Cyanoderma ruficeps praecognitum），台灣特有亞種。該物種的模式產地位於現今淡水河下游附近的山區 。


描述
此鳥呈淺橄欖色，頭頂與頸背鮮棕紅色，體長12 cm（4.7英寸），體重7—12 g（0.25—0.42 oz）。红头穗鹛的平均体重约为11.1克。


分布與棲地
分布于香港、不丹、老挝、中国大陆、越南、印度、缅甸、台湾和尼泊尔。全球活动范围约为2,210,000平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
栖息地包括温带森林、亚热带或热带的湿润低地林和亚热带或热带的湿润山地林。该物种的模式产地在印度大吉岭。


参考文献


外部連結

紅頭穗鶥普通亞種(Stachyris ruficeps (davidi))鳴聲 （页面存档备份，存于互联网档案馆）香港觀鳥會鳥鳴集
